name: Bertrandt AG
description: Bertrandt delivers AI-powered Quality Management solutions to master complexity: from intelligent risk and FMEA optimization to streamlined regulatory management—ensuring speed, compliance, and efficiency in fast-paced development environments.

name: Adastra
description: Engage with a trusted AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft partner that will help you maximize your investments in AI and machine learning. name: IV.AI
description: The company, IV.AI, specializes in artificial intelligence, offering solutions in machine learning, natural language processing, and decision-making powered by AI.

name: Empower AI
description: Empower AI specializes in providing mission-critical AI technology to federal agencies, enhancing workforce productivity through automation and predictive technologies. name: [24]7.ai

Their platform, [24]7 Engagement CloudTM, enhances interactions by integrating AI applications like the [24]7 AI Virtual Agent (AIVA), which automates voice and digital engagements, and [24]7 Agent Assist AI, supporting contact center staff.

name: M47 Labs
description: The company highlights its leadership in the AI solutions sector, emphasizing a team of technical experts and a strong focus on developing innovative AI products. name: Tryolabs
description: The company specializes in tailored artificial intelligence solutions, offering a comprehensive range of services throughout the AI lifecycle, including machine learning, deep learning, and natural language processing. name: Anfactor AI™
description: The company has established itself as a leading AI solutions provider, specializing in finance and banking, and leveraging advanced technology, including artificial intelligence, to drive business transformation. name: Huawei Cloud APAC
